'''Judgement 12-X7''' was a [[Hunter-Killer probot]] assigned to [[Byss Security]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]. It tried to apprehend the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] when it was inside the ''[[Hyperspace Marauder]]''. After capturing the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] vessel, its pilots [[Shug Ninx]] and [[Salla Zend]], a pair of smugglers working for the New Republic, took control of the droid's circuitry, reprogramming it to help them rescue [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] from an Imperial prison by firing on the section of the prison where they were being detained. However, their escape attempt was noticed by a Imperial patrol, which Shug turned Judgement 12-X7's attack systems against, causing a firefight to break out between the reprogrammed probot and the Imperial prison's defense systems. Quickly boarding the Millennium Falcon which was still within Judgement 12-X7, Shug set the probot to autofire on the Imperials allowing the New Republic agents to escape Byss just as Judement 12-X7 was destroyed by the prison's [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]].<ref name="DE5" />
